历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 1134, and in 2024 it was approximately 1915, with a significant backward shift of about 781 positions over two years, reflecting a notable decline in competition heat for this university in Xinjiang Science; the 2023 Science enrollment plan was 45 students, 2024 was 44, and the 2026 plan is 40, showing a gradual annual reduction trend; the 2025 plan. Enrollment reduction usually intensifies competition, but recent ranking trends indicate other factors have a greater impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China University of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 32nd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in the 25-32 range in recent years, belonging to top domestic engineering institutions; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is "significantly negative," mainly due to 34 negative public opinions triggered by a campus peeping incident, which may suppress candidates' willingness to apply, causing rankings to shift backward; Douyin popularity ranks 87th (average), with low short video exposure; it has 9 A- and above disciplines including Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Food Science and Engineering A, Architecture A-, and Control Science and Engineering A-, with outstanding engineering strength highly matched to enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), and Computer Science (recommended) continue to have high social popularity, positively driving applications for related majors; the number of Science candidates in Xinjiang in 2025 is about 52,500, and the total number of candidates in 2026 is about 238,000, with Science candidates estimated at about 163,000 based on the recent Science proportion of about 68.6%, showing a significant increase in candidate scale, intensifying overall competition; South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, far from Xinjiang, with limited impact of regional preference factors on Xinjiang candidates' applications; the university's enrollment plan in Xinjiang accounts for a small proportion, about 1%-2% of the total enrollment plan in recent years, making it a non-major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the significant backward shift trend in rankings from 2023 to 2024, the clearly negative reputation in 2026, the substantial increase in the number of Xinjiang candidates, and the slight reduction in enrollment plans, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Science in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2024 ranking of 1915. With limited corrections based on factors such as negative reputation (pushing ranking up by about +50 positions) and increased candidates (pushing ranking up by about +30 positions), while also considering the slight forward pull effect of electronic information majors' popularity (about -10 positions). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1881, with a fluctuation range of 1599-2163.

If the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<1599), focus on sprinting for popular majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>2163), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors. South China University of Technology has outstanding engineering strength, and majors such as Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, and Computer Science have good employment prospects, making them worth prioritizing.
